# Interactive Chat Bubbles - LLM Context Map

> 3D physics-based bubbles that pop on screen when viewers comment.

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack**: Next.js 15, React 19, Three.js, React Three Fiber, drei, Twitch IRC WebSocket
**Status**: v0.1.0 implemented
**Purpose**: 3D physics-based bubbles that pop on screen when viewers comment.
**Tier**: 3 (Viral)
**Group**: A (Public source plus public demo)
**Day**: 1 of 25
**Target Audience**: TikTokers and Twitch streamers
**Pricing Range**: $15 to $35

---

## Core Documentation

### README.md
Product overview, quick start, OBS browser source instructions, settings, and roadmap.

### decisions.md
Architecture decision records for browser-only runtime, Twitch IRC, and custom physics.

### memory.md
Implementation history, current state, and what changed across iterations.

### tasks.md
Active sprint tracker, completed items, and next priorities.

(Skip files this tier does not use. See `_templates/README.md` in the meta-repo for the per-tier matrix.)

---

## Key Files

### src/app/page.tsx
Main preview route for the stream overlay with controls and status chrome.

### src/app/overlay/page.tsx
OBS browser source route with transparent background and no UI chrome.

### src/app/settings/page.tsx
Settings route for platform, channel, bubble count, lifetime, scale, and labels.

### src/components/
React UI and React Three Fiber scene components.

### src/lib/
Settings persistence, synthetic test feed, Twitch IRC WebSocket, and shared types.

---

## Common Tasks

**Start dev server**: `npm run dev`
**Build**: `npm run build`
**Typecheck**: `npm run typecheck`
**Deploy**: `vercel --prod --yes`
